formula: For each split, highpass(mean(group A), sigma=8 px) and highpass(mean(group B), sigma=8 px); stable map=(A+B)/2; strength=sample std; repeatability=Pearson(A,B). Folder summary uses median strength and minimum/median correlation across odd-even, first-second half, and alternating 25-frame blocks.
roi_sensitivity: available from historical bounded ROI audit; component is not relabeled as FPN
scene_leakage_risk: HIGH-UNRESOLVED because ordinary-scene structure can repeat in both split means
